description: Per-platform promo colony for X (Twitter): a writer drafts a short grounded thread from this group's brain, the coordinator posts it via the internal CreateTweet API (cookie auth X_AUTH_TOKEN+X_CT0), then shares the link to FLOWORK_OS. Topics + facts seeded; anti-duplicate ledger.
author: @flowork-os

exposes_rpc.name: handle_message
exposes_rpc.description: Post a grounded X thread: /auto = autonomous (next topic), or {text} = thread from source.
